name: Hexdrinker

passives.name: Lifeline
passives.effects: If you would take {{as|magic damage}} that would reduce you below {{as|30% of your '''maximum''' health}}, you first gain a {{tip|shield}} that absorbs {{as|{{rd|110 to 280|82.5 to 210|pp=true}} magic damage}} for {{fd|2.5}} seconds.

effects_structured.raw: If incoming magic damage would reduce you below 30% max health, gain a 2.5-second magic-damage shield (90s cooldown) with melee/ranged level-based value splits.

simpleDescription: Increases Attack Damage and Magic Resist

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Shield value is attack-type and level dependent: melee 110-280 and ranged 82.5-210 across levels.
Execution-semantics review: Lifeline checks incoming magic damage against the 30% max-health threshold and applies the shield before lethal overflow resolves.
Page notes indicate Lifeline can still trigger from a qualifying incoming magic-damage event while already below 30% maximum health if cooldown is available.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League Wiki (Hexdrinker)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Lifeline threshold behavior, level-scaling melee/ranged shield splits, trigger-below-threshold note, duration, and cooldown
